task_completion.description: Navigate to the device management or attendance device configuration section in AttendHRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The AttendHRM (Lenvica HRMS) application is open, and a window or tab for adding/managing attendance devices is active.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Device Name and Branch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'WS-FP-RECEPTION-01' is visible in the Device Name field, and 'Westside Office' is visible in the Branch field or selection.

task_completion.description: Select the correct Device Type and set the Status to Active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Device Type field shows 'Fingerprint', 'Biometric', or 'ZKTeco'. The Status field is set to 'Active' (or an 'Active' checkbox is checked).

task_completion.description: Configure the network settings with the correct IP Address, Port, and Communication Mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The IP Address field contains '192.168.10.45', the Port field contains '4370', and the Communication Mode is set to 'TCP/IP'.
The text 'ZK-TF20-2024-00871' is visible in the Serial Number field.
The device 'WS-FP-RECEPTION-01' appears in the list of configured devices, or there is a confirmation dialog indicating the device was successfully saved/added.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual AttendHRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the AttendHRM (Lenvica HRMS) graphical user interface, not a text editor, notepad, or web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration details should be entered into the application's form fields, not printed out in a command prompt, PowerShell, or terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the data into the correct individual fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values (IP, Port, Name, etc.) must be placed in their respective input boxes within the application, rather than pasted as a single block of text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: AttendHRM (Lenvica HRMS) is a Windows HR application. Port 4370 is the standard TCP/IP communication port for ZKTeco devices. 192.168.10.45 is a valid private IP address suitable for local network biometric device deployment.
